rankings.title: Why Nobody Feels Loved Anymore - Sonja Lyubomirsky
summary_bullets: Happiness interventions work by increasing connection.

Lost 60 pounds, relearned to walk, now aims to live 39+ years.
Argues talent doesn’t exist; desire and environment matter more.
Plans to wrestle again and release a documentary.

rankings.title: 3 Questions That Reveal What’s Wrong With Your Life - Arthur Brooks
summary_bullets: Meaning has three components: coherence, purpose, significance.
Coherence answers “why are things happening?”
Purpose gives direction and progress toward goals.
Significance is feeling your life matters to others.
Love is a free gift, not earned.
